/usr/bin/ar qc libencoder_lib.a  CMakeFiles/encoder_lib.dir/hal/ModbusRTU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_lib.dir/hal/SerialPort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_lib.dir/hal/CustomProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_lib.dir/driver/EncoderDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_lib.dir/driver/DeviceDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_lib.dir/Encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_lib.dir/Sensor.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libencoder_lib.a
